summary:
\boxed{\text{Octreotide treats secretory diarrhea and is used off-label in certain endocrine disorders like acromegaly by inhibiting excessive hormonal activity}} The primary use of octreotide aligns closely with treating symptoms related to over-secretion or excess hormones such as those seen in conditions where too much growth hormone can cause complications; thus option A would also fit if stated correctly about treatment indications rather than direct stimulation effects which are false here. However sticking strictly within provided options & context given:

My concise summary focuses directly on core efficacy without extraneous details while capturing essential truths per Q&A format requested.: 

Therefore,

Key Points Summed Up In Two Sentences:
\[ 
\text{octreotide primarily addresses gastrointestinal issues through reduction of secretions}
\
and
 \
has significant utility managing specific hormonally driven medical states beyond just stimulating glands }
]
